response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video content from 00:00 to 05:00. 2. Identified the primary content as a spoken-word announcement by the VTuber Takane Lui regarding upcoming projects ('REBELLION' live and 'LEADENDARY' mini-album) and birthday merchandise. 3. Confirmed that there is no vocal music performance throughout the video; the background audio is purely instrumental. 4. Set the fields for vocal music to null/false accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features an announcement by the VTuber Takane Lui regarding her 2026 1st Live concert titled 'REBELLION' and the release of her mini-album 'LEADENDARY', followed by a showcase of birthday commemoration merchandise. There is no vocal music in this video.

scenes.description: Takane Lui announces her 2026 'REBELLION' 1st Live concert and the release of her mini-album 'LEADENDARY' at Kanadevia Hall.
Takane Lui presents the birthday commemoration 2026 merchandise set.
